'''gasotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaddling|swaddling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaddling|swaddling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gasotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsetheth|gæsetheth]] || [[word:gæsethej|gæsethej]] || [[word:gæsethesh|gæsethesh]] || [[word:gæsethe|gæsethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasosothoth|gasosothoth]] || [[word:gasosothoj|gasosothoj]] || [[word:gasosothosh|gasosothosh]] || [[word:gasosotho|gasosotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasothoth|gasothoth]] || [[word:gasothoj|gasothoj]] || [[word:gasothosh|gasothosh]] || [[word:gasotho|gasotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasofthoth|gasofthoth]] || [[word:gasofthoj|gasofthoj]] || [[word:gasofthosh|gasofthosh]] || [[word:gasofthof|gasofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gasothotho|gasothotho]] || [[word:gasothojo|gasothojo]] || [[word:gasothosho|gasothosho]] || [[word:gasothoko|gasothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gasothoth|gasothoth]] || [[word:gasothoj|gasothoj]] || [[word:gasothosh|gasothosh]] || [[word:gasotho|gasotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gasothothol|gasothothol]] || [[word:gasothojol|gasothojol]] || [[word:gasothoshol|gasothoshol]] || [[word:gasothokol|gasothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gasothothotho|gasothothotho]] || [[word:gasothojojo|gasothojojo]] || [[word:gasothoshosho|gasothoshosho]] || [[word:gasothoko|gasothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gasothothon|gasothothon]] || [[word:gasothojon|gasothojon]] || [[word:gasothoshon|gasothoshon]] || [[word:gasothokon|gasothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gasothothoro|gasothothoro]] || [[word:gasothojoro|gasothojoro]] || [[word:gasothoshoro|gasothoshoro]] || [[word:gasothokoro|gasothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
